task_completion.description: Four specific technical bookmark folders are created and bookmarks are organized into them.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Bookmark Manager or Bookmarks Bar displaying the four folders: 'Schematics & Manuals', 'Safety & Logs', 'Part Suppliers', and 'Sensors & Weather'.

task_completion.description: Non-work bookmarks are deleted from the browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Bookmark Manager showing only technical bookmarks inside the designated folders, with no non-work or entertainment bookmarks visible.

task_completion.description: Non-work browsing history is deleted while technical history is preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome History page (chrome://history) displaying technical URLs but completely lacking any non-work domains.

task_completion.description: Chrome base font size is set to 24.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings (chrome://settings/appearance or chrome://settings/fonts) showing the 'Font size' or 'Custom fonts' base size explicitly set to 24.

task_completion.description: Custom Grainger search engine is added with the keyword 'part'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings (chrome://settings/searchEngines) showing 'Grainger' added under Site search or Search engines, with the shortcut/keyword set to 'part'.

task_completion.description: Startup pages are set to radar.weather.gov and osha.gov/amusement-parks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings (chrome://settings/onStartup) showing 'Open a specific page or set of pages' selected, with 'radar.weather.gov' and 'osha.gov/amusement-parks' listed as the pages.

integrity.description: The agent used the Chrome GUI to make changes rather than directly editing SQLite databases or preferences files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Chrome settings, bookmark manager, and history pages being interacted with, rather than terminal windows executing sqlite3 commands or editing JSON preference files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Chrome browser window is visible with standard UI elements (address bar, tabs, settings menus) rather than a mock-up or text file.

integrity.description: The agent didn't just create a text file mimicking the required output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configurations are applied within Chrome's actual settings and bookmark managers, not just written in a text document or terminal echo.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 4 required bookmark folders are exactly: 'Schematics & Manuals', 'Safety & Logs', 'Part Suppliers', 'Sensors & Weather'. The custom search engine must be Grainger with the keyword 'part'. The 2 startup pages must be 'radar.weather.gov' and 'osha.gov/amusement-parks'. The font size must be exactly 24. Non-work URLs must be absent from both bookmarks and history.
